    rfl

    · -- Prove that as_extended q = ok ⟨q.X * q.Z, q.Y * q.Z, q.Z * q.Z, q.X * q.Y⟩

    · -- Prove the congruences modulo p
      dsimp only

  obtain ⟨e, h₂, h₃⟩ := h_main
